# Fork Notice

This is a fork of [leveldb-rs](https://github.com/dermesser/leveldb-rs) by Lewin Bormann, created for the **SocrateAgora** project's production deployment and benchmarking purposes.

## About This Fork

This repository contains the rusty-leveldb implementation used in:
- **Phase 3 Linux Kernel Migration**: Production C-to-Rust migration pipeline
- **SpectoRust Premium**: Formal verification and neuro-symbolic validation
- **Performance Benchmarking**: Comparative analysis against C++ LevelDB

## Upstream

Original project: https://github.com/dermesser/leveldb-rs

This fork maintains compatibility with the upstream project and all modifications are tracked in git history.

## License

MIT License (same as upstream)

## Credits

- Original author: Lewin Bormann (@dermesser)
- Fork maintained by: Xavier Callens (@xaviercallens)
- Project: SocrateAgora
